nodes.itemHTML: • Let's Markdown! - An online real-time collaborative markdown editor built on Rust.
• Bangle.io - A Notion like note taking webapp where data is saved in Markdown format locally.
• Laravel CommonMark Blogstars13 - Static-generator to use with Laravel. Utilizes CommonMark and FrontMatter and publishes directly into the public-folder.
